title: Easy Mini-Style Trivia
description: Short, breezy questions in the spirit of a daily mini puzzle. Built for warming up.

questions.prompt: Tropical orange-fleshed stone fruit, five letters:
questions.explanation: Mango — five letters, fits the clue.

questions.prompt: Largest planet in our solar system:
questions.explanation: Jupiter is the largest, with a mass greater than all other planets combined.

questions.prompt: Number of sides on a hexagon:
questions.explanation: Hex- = six. Octagon has eight, pentagon has five.

questions.prompt: Which of these is a primary color?
questions.explanation: The three primary colors of light are red, green, and blue; in paint they are red, yellow, and blue. Yellow is the only primary in this list.
Rhode Island is about 1,545 square miles.
The yen has been Japan's currency since 1871.

questions.prompt: Tallest mountain on Earth, measured from sea level:

questions.explanation: Africa, Antarctica, Asia, Australia, Europe, North America, and South America.
